message:
feat(bun): Implement worker capability probing for runtime detection

Add runtime capability detection to enable routing commands to workers
with required runtimes (Bun, Node, Rust). This enables the selection
algorithm to filter workers based on what runtimes are installed.

Key changes:
- rch-wkr: Add Capabilities subcommand for JSON output of detected
  runtimes (rustc, bun, node, npm versions)
- rch-wkr: Add runtime info to Info command output
- rchd: Probe worker capabilities during health checks via SSH
- rchd: Add RequiredRuntime enum to SelectionRequest for filtering
- rchd: Filter workers by runtime capability in selection algorithm
- rchd: Return NoWorkersWithRuntime reason when no workers match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
